creator: sega01@go-beyond.org
text:
I can boot 12.2-RELEASE AMD64 via USB just fine, but if I burn it to a DVD I cannot boot it successfully on a Thinkpad R400 or R500. I get this error:

ERROR: cannot open /boot/lua/loader.lua: no such file or directory

The exact same DVD works fine on a Dell T5400 desktop, however. My 12.1-RELEASE DVDs boot just fine on the Thinkpad R400 and R500.

This might be related: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=238749
